description:
Legal record (#34) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 9r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 1 Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #34) Agreement between the shaliaḥ Barzilay ha-Kohen, of Hebron, and the head rabbi of Cairo in the latter half of the seventeenth century, R. Mordekhay ha-Levi (d. 1684 CE). The agreement lays out the terms for ha-Levi to take up residence in Hebron in a specific home, with a weekly stipend and privileges (such as tax payment exemptions). All these conditions are approved by the shaliaḥ who has the power of attorney to act on behalf of the Hebron community. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#34) בפנקס בית דין רבני בקהיר (BL OR 6356, דף 9r); בעברית; א' ניסן ה'תמ"ג (1683 לספירה); הסכם בין השליח ברזילי הכהן מחברון לבין ר' מרדכי הלוי (נפטר 1684), ראש רבני קהיר; ר' מרדכי יתיישב בחברון ויקבל קיצבה שבועית ופטורים ממסים
